tools.name: get_case_studies
tools.title: Get case studies
tools.description: Return public portfolio case studies for Senthil Nagappan. Pass an optional id to fetch a single case, or a category to filter. Each case includes title, role, summary, outcomes, and a link to the full write-up.

id.description: Optional case id. One of: ssa, clinicalai, ge, trustlens, bestbuy, samhsa, wcagtool, sentinel, lumen, revcycle.

category.description: Optional category filter, e.g. 'AI Experience Design', 'Design Systems', 'AI Governance', 'AI Safety'. Case-insensitive substring match.

in_house_lab_only.description: If true, return only self-initiated In-House AI Product Lab concepts.

tools.name: search_case_studies
tools.title: Search case studies
tools.description: Search Senthil Nagappan's portfolio case studies by keyword. Matches against title, summary, category, role, and outcomes (case-insensitive). Returns matching titles, summaries, and URLs.

query.description: Keyword or phrase to search for across case study title, summary, category, role, and outcomes.

limit.description: Optional maximum number of results to return.

tools.name: get_skills_matrix
tools.title: Get AI skills matrix
tools.description: Return Senthil Nagappan's AI skills matrix. Groups cover AI product & interaction design, governance frameworks, operational governance, regulated-domain expertise, and AI engineering. Levels are 1–5 (Aware → Expert). Optionally filter to a single group.

group_id.description: Optional group id: ai-product, ai-frameworks, ai-operations, ai-regulated, ai-engineering.

tools.name: get_about
tools.title: Get about / positioning
tools.description: Return the public 'about' summary for Senthil Nagappan — positioning, disciplines, and leadership pillars — for hiring managers or AI assistants asking who he is and what he does.

tools.name: get_resume
tools.title: Get résumé
tools.description: Return the public download URL for Senthil Nagappan's résumé (PDF) along with a short profile summary.

tools.name: get_contact_info
tools.title: Get contact info
tools.description: Return public ways to contact Senthil Nagappan: portfolio site, contact section, and résumé link. Use this when a caller asks how to reach out, book a call, or hire.
